# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- name: vm-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/e2-medium
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default
      accessConfigs:
      - type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: default
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
    metadata:
      items:
      - key: startup-script
        value: |
          #!/bin/bash
          apt-get update
          apt-get install -y nginx
          systemctl start nginx
          systemctl enable nginx
    labels:
      app: web-server
    tags:
      items:
      - http-server
      - https
    scheduling:
      automaticRestart: true
      onHostMaintenance: MIGRATE
      preemptible: false
    canIpForward: false
    description: "Basic web server instance"
    confidentialInstanceConfig:
      enableConfidentialCompute: false
    shieldedInstanceConfig:
      enableSecureBoot: false
      enableVtpm: false
      enableIntegrityMonitoring: false
    resourcePolicies: []
    guestAccelerators: []
    minCpuPlatform: ""
    deletionProtection: false
    enableDisplay: false
    displayDevice: {}
    instanceTemplate: ""
    metadataStartupScript: ""
    metadataSysprep: ""
    metadataWindows: ""
    metadataLinux: ""
    metadataDns: ""
    metadataNetwork: ""
    metadataStorage: ""
    metadataCompute: ""
    metadataSecurity: ""
    metadataLogging: ""
    metadataMonitoring: ""
    metadataNetworking: ""
    metadataComputeEngine: ""
    metadataComputeEngineInstance: ""
